title: Deadline mode - date show status is done but status column isn't done
excerpt:
I turned the deadline mode, and set the “done” tag in the status column. 
Date hasn’t arrived yet and status is “Grey” but the green line on the date column show the status is Done. 
Any idea? 
Meytal

posts.author: meytalPeleg (Meytal Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I turned the deadline mode, and set the “done” tag in the status column.
Date hasn’t arrived yet and status is “Grey” but the green line on the date column show the status is Done.

Any idea?
Meytal

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @meytalPeleg

Did you have a look at the status column setting that defines which statuses mean completed? In this example both “Stage 1” (green) and “Stage 2” (orange) will mark the date as completed

posts.author: meytalPeleg (Meytal Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes… That’s the first thing I did. Very strange.

Meytal Peleg

posts.cookedHtml: Indeed… very strange. I would aks monday support team about this one.
